title: Electricity Consumption Forecast Website
description: This project involves developing a web application that visualizes electricity consumption forecasts generated by various machine learning models. The model uses data from selected Public Schools in Davao City and UNICON, enabling users to explore trends and gain comparative insights through an intuitive interface.

title: COA Submission Hub
description: This project involves developing a web application that streamlines the submission and tracking of Commission on Audit (COA) forms, providing a user-friendly interface to manage submissions efficiently while ensuring proper processing and compliance. The platform is accessible only to Ateneo de Davao (AdDU) accounts.

title: Badminton Court Management System
description: This project involves developing a mobile-based management system that allows badminton court owners to efficiently handle reservations, track player activities, and organize tournaments. The platform streamlines day-to-day operations through a user-friendly interface, improving scheduling, and overall management.
